zh.Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Englan: 英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓
zh.Farnborough, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾法爾波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton於1400年2月10日出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton31歲，母親Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere16歲。他於大約1417年與Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley在英國諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1462年1月18日在他的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton于1400年2月10日出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton31岁，母亲Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere16岁。他于大约1417年与Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley在英国諾薩普頓史爾格倫也斯 諾頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1462年1月18日在他的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton was born on 10 February 1400, in Norton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton, was 31 and his mother, Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere, was 16. He married Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley about 1417, in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 18 January 1462, in his hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton est né le 10 février 1400, à Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley environ 1417, à Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 18 janvier 1462, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton am 10. Februar 1400 in Norton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton 31 und seine Mutter Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere 16. Er hat um 1417 in Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Januar 1462 im Alter von 61 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton è nato il il 10 febbraio 1400 nel Norton, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley circa 1417, nel Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 gennaio 1462, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Nortonが1400年2月10日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノートンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Nortonは31歳，母Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemereは16歳であった。約1417年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグリーネ'ス ノートンでLady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1462年1月18日に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton(이)가 1400년 2월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1417년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그렌'스 노르턴에서 Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1462년 1월 18일 그의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.10 February 1400–18 January 1462: 1400 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 10–1462 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 18

pt.10 February 1400–18 January 1462: 10 de fevereiro de 1400–18 de janeiro de 1462
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton nasceu em 10 de fevereiro de 1400, em Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley aproximadamente 1417, em Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1462, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton родился 10 февраля 1400 г. в местности нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley около 1417 г. в местности грине'с нортон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 18 января 1462 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.10 February 1400–18 January 1462: 10 de febrero de 1400–18 de enero de 1462
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Grene III of Grene's Norton nació el 10 de febrero de 1400, en Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas de Grene II of Grene's Norton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Mary de Talbot of Blakemere, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Lady Philippe de Ferrers of Chartley aproximadamente 1417, en Grene's Norton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de enero de 1462, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
